name: strike
description: Strike workflow plus focused planning utilities for agent-assisted delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Strike turns ideas into shipped changes with companion planning utilities
interface.longDescription: Strike packages a staged workflow plus focused utilities for agent-assisted delivery. Use Strike to refine an idea, create durable initiative docs, split delivery phases into slices, build, review, verify, and close readiness. Companion utilities create planning demos, visualize systems, sharpen domain language, and write handoffs while keeping runtime state in the consuming repository.
defaultPrompt: Use Strike to build and ship this idea.
Create a planning demo for this idea.
